title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: An economics-focused podcast episode exploring how AI productivity gains will affect capital versus labor share, tax policy design, wealth redistribution mechanisms, and the economic strategy for developing nations in an AGI future. The central claim is that AI's economic gains may not translate straightforwardly to larger corporate profit shares if productivity becomes extremely high.
